opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My skin's suddenly gone all over in intensely itchy red-brown blotches, my thighs are aching deep in the bone, and I'm terrified my throat is going to close up like it has before. Please help me.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on fast a couple of hours ago after I bumped and rubbed my skin, and with my history I panic that it's turning into one of my bad reactions.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 2 hours ago, not long after minor friction/bumping against my skin
symptom_narrative.character: loads of intensely itchy red-brown raised blotches that welt up and swell more when I scratch or rub them, with an all-over hot flushed feeling, plus a deep throbbing ache in my thigh bones
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the itch and the bone ache are really distressing — I can't settle
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: blotches all over my torso and limbs; the deep ache is in both thighs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on quickly and has stayed constant since
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: an over-the-counter antihistamine I took earlier barely helped; a cold flannel eases the itch a bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: scratching or rubbing the spots makes them swell up more
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: flushed and sweaty all over, heart feels like it's pounding, and I'm very anxious
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had several severe allergic-type reactions in the past that needed adrenaline
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm up and walking around but too distressed by the itch and ache to rest

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a mast cell condition my specialist diagnosed
several past severe allergic reactions that needed my adrenaline pen

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an over-the-counter antihistamine I took earlier today
an adrenaline auto-injector (EpiPen) I keep with me

allergies_as_reported.substance: various unpredictable triggers set my reactions off

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; very anxious about how unpredictable and sudden the reactions can be

objective_data_offered.value: widespread red-brown raised itchy blotches over the trunk and limbs that welt and swell up when I scratch or rub them
looking flushed and sweaty all over
my heart feels like it's pounding, around 100 beats a minute or so
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-estimated pulse, not measured on a device

objective_data_offered.value: right now my throat isn't swelling, my voice sounds normal, I'm not wheezing and I can breathe okay
no vomiting and I don't feel faint or dizzy when I stand
my adrenaline auto-injectors are right here on the bedside table
